title: Transparent Budgeting
definition: A clear and detailed financial plan for a project, including all costs and expected expenses.

difficulty_levels.beginner: An easy-to-understand breakdown of the project's financial needs, making it more appealing to potential funders.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Detailed budgeting that offers a complete picture of a project's funding requirements and costs, promoting trust and accountability with funders.
difficulty_levels.expert: A comprehensive approach to financial planning that not only outlines the costs but also provides insights into the allocation of resources and potential return on investment.

extra_fields.insight: Open and honest budgeting as a key factor in securing funding for innovative projects by showcasing fiscal restraint and transparency.
